products.name: VICIVISION
products.subtitle: About VICIVISION
products.description: VICIVISION manufactures advanced optical, non-contact shaft measuring machines for modern manufacturing industries. High-speed measurement systems improve productivity, accuracy and quality control across multiple industrial sectors.

products.name: TESA
products.subtitle: About TESA
products.description:
TESA is a leading manufacturer of precision measuring instruments.
Global market leader in height gauges.
Reliable and durable instruments.

products.name: A
products.subtitle: About Air Dryers
products.description:
These products are perfectly designed by a team of our highly talented personnel making use of supreme class raw material.
Typical application of these air dryers is along with CMMs and Machine Tools.
The entire array of products is widely noticed for their high performance, less maintenance, reliability, corrosion resistance and longer service life.

products.name: Prima Series
products.subtitle: Prima Series
products.description:
The optical measuring machine for all CNC lathes.
Simplicity allows each operator to control the production process at any time.
The aim is to provide high measurement standards in a new competitive and compact machine.
Detect hundreds of measurements in seconds on all turned and ground parts.
The measuring fields are from 60 to 140 mm diameter and 300 to 600 mm length.

Static measures:
- diameter
- length
- angle
- radius
- chamfer

Dynamic measures:
- coaxiality
- runout
- circularity
- cylindricity
- taper

products.name: Techno Series
products.subtitle: Techno Series
products.description:
This measuring machine range is designed to adapt to current and future manufacturing demands. The modular range of the Techno series can provide the most suitable machine for your production.

From 40 to 250 mm in diameter, and from 300 to 2000 mm in length.

VICIVISION offers the evolution of the profile projector, a compact and quick optical comparator for shopfloor use.

Special Applications:
- Crankshaft
- Camshaft
- Turbine Wheel
- Tactile Probing System
- Confocal System for spline measurement

products.name: X Series
products.subtitle: X Series
products.description:
MTL X5, MTL X10 and MTL X360 are optical measuring devices specifically designed to measure micro-mechanical parts, dental implants, watch parts and micro-parts in general.

These high resolution machines detect even the smallest details.

Measuring instruments designed for every need:
- Coaxiality
- Cylindricity
- Axial and radial run-out
- Roundness
- Thread measurements
- Nut measurements

products.name: 1D Height Gauges
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
TESA 1D height gauge with its refined panel and its easily-accessible software is typically used in workshops. It focuses on the main functions necessary for quick measurements and immediate access to the results.

Its optical reading system offers users greater accuracy than its magnetic system counterpart (TESA-HITE MAGNA) without having to compromise on its long-term reliability.

products.name: 2D Height Gauges
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
This high-end instrument is intuitive due to a clear and refined user philosophy of its embedded software and allows measurements in 1 or 2 coordinate directions. Universal machine developed for workshops and for laboratories that can be integrated as close as possible to the user.

Indeed, the robustness of its cast iron base and frame makes it a reliable instrument that guarantees an excellent repeatability and precision in any kind of conditions. With the exception of the 1D basis functions, it is equipped with advanced functions (angle, programming, tolerancing, 2D, ...) and turns it into a metrological “multi-user” asset, that replaces the most conventional measuring tools.

products.name: Bluetooth Connectivity
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
The TESA TLC-BLE wireless Bluetooth® emitter allows to connect measuring instruments to a computer.

Thanks to the free software TESA DATA-VIEWER, data can be easily collected, analyzed and stored, avoiding transcription errors and ensuring a perfect traceability.

products.name: Digital Caliper
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
In harsh environments such as workshops, the instruments are often subjected to all kinds of substances such as oil and water. This is why TESA digital instruments incorporate well-proven materials and offer a high degree of protection.

They guarantee longevity, robustness and high-performance measurements on instruments that are often used on a daily and continuous basis.

products.name: Digital Display Unit
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
The TWIN-T20 digital display allows two measured values to be displayed simultaneously, both on the production floor and in the test laboratory.

Multiple inputs allow you to connect TESA probes and a wide range of measuring devices via the integrated USB ports. Intuitive navigation makes it easy to set measurement tolerances and choose the type of display to optimize reading for users.

products.name: Digital Indicators
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
The new DIALTRONIC COMPACT range of digital dial gauges enables measuring applications to be carried out with a minimum of space thanks to the 45 mm diameter dial.

These dial gauges are ideal for measurements at various positions or integrated in machines.

products.name: Electronic Probes
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
TESA INDUCTIVE PROBES WITH DETACHABLE CABLE allow users to maintain their measuring stations quicker and cheaper.

By unscrewing the probe from its cable, changing operations are easier and take less time and resources.

Particularly suitable for multi-gauging installations, the resistant and flexible cable combined with a robust connector allows the use of TESA probes in harsh environments.

products.name: External Micrometers
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
Without compromising the stability of the instrument, the weight of the TESA micrometer is reduced to a minimum in order to make it easier to handle, especially when measuring with one hand.

The functional shape of the instrument, the smooth running of the micrometer screw, the secure locking and the friction ratchet also contribute to this. The robustness of the micrometer ensures that its accuracy is maintained over time.

products.name: Internal Micrometers
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
Self-centering and self-aligning internal micrometers. The high-precision thread machined into the measuring cone, combined with the measuring bolts specially arranged to provide 3-line contact, make them the only micrometers in the world that respect the ABBE principle.

Measure depth, reliably.

products.name: Measuring Stations
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
The measuring station TESA μ-HITE is far more than a height gauge. This compact, robust, yet highly accurate instrument is designed for measurement operations in the workshop, close to machining centres, as well as more controlled and secure inspection sites such as laboratories.

With its measuring range of 100 mm, this “all-in-one” station is particularly suitable for controlling small parts close to the production. It can even replace the use of conventional 1D probes which have a very limited measuring range and are often dedicated to a single application.

products.name: Roughness Testers
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
The TESA TWIN-SURF is a compact, portable roughness tester, compatible with any articulated support and powered by a rechargeable battery that enables long-term self-sufficiency.

Its monochrome OLED display optimises power consumption and ensures high contrast for clear reading. Simplified ergonomics with 3 buttons on the top allows the easy definition of measurement parameters, adjustment of tolerances and starting of the measurement.

The Bluetooth® version allows wireless communication with a PC, tablet or smartphone equipped with the same software.

products.name: Test Indicators
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
These lever-type dial test indicators are especially intended for use on the shop floor or in the inspection room. Ideally suited for comparative measurements on a surface plate, for instance.

- Determine form, shape and position deviations as well as axial and runout errors
- Bidirectional measuring with automatic reversal inside the movement
- Continuous clockwise pointer rotation providing error-free reading
- Insensitive to magnetic fields
- Very low measuring force
- Exceptionally robust with full-metal construction
